cases.title: TS-20: Authenticated enrolled student mobile check-in marks Present within 2 s
preconditions: Active session with valid room GPS (10.762622, 106.660172) and gpsRadiusMeters 100
Enrolled Student authenticated with valid session cookie
Valid unexpired QrToken (issued within 30 s) from GET /sessions/:sessionId/qr/current
Student coordinates within radius (10.762700, 106.660200)
Student attendance status is Pending for session
TestClock within attendance window (scheduledStart + 10 min)
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session and assert HTTP 200 with outcome Valid and session summary
Record wall-clock start time before POST /check-in
POST /check-in with tokenId, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200, spoofMetadata.platform android using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response outcome Success and message Điểm danh thành công
Assert response attendance.status Present and checkedInAt is ISO 8601 timestamp
Assert elapsed wall-clock time from request start to response ≤ 2000 ms under normal network
GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance scoped to student and assert status Present
Query qr_tokens for tokenId and assert status Consumed
cases.expected: AC-07a satisfied: preflight passes; mobile web check-in succeeds; attendance Present; confirmation within 2 s p95 per NFR-04; QrToken Consumed atomically

cases.title: TS-21: Student not enrolled in session check-in rejected with no Present record
preconditions: Active session for class HESD-01 / subject SWE-101 exists
Authenticated Student B exists but is not enrolled in session class-subject pair
Valid unexpired QrToken for Active session
Student B coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student B session
Assert HTTP status 403 with outcome NotEnrolled and errorCode NotEnrolled
POST /check-in with valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates using Student B session
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response outcome NotEnrolled and errorCode NotEnrolled
GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance for Student B context and assert no Present record
Query attendance_records for Student B and sessionId and assert status is not Present (no row or Pending unchanged)
cases.expected: AC-07b and AC-07e satisfied: preflight and submit reject non-enrolled student with message Bạn không thuộc danh sách lớp của buổi học này; no Present attendance created per API design §6.2–6.3

cases.title: CheckInService.submit atomically marks Present and consumes QrToken in PostgreSQL transaction
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Active session row with enrollment and Pending attendance_records row for studentId
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid for sessionId
CheckInService wired to AttendanceService and QrTokenRepository with serializable isolation
steps: Record beforeState: attendance status Pending, qr_token status Valid
Invoke CheckInService.submit(tokenId, locationPayload, studentId) with in-radius coordinates
Query attendance_records for sessionId and studentId
Query qr_tokens for tokenId
Query check_in_attempts for latest attempt and assert outcome Success
cases.expected: Single transaction per domain model §5.2: attendance transitions to Present with checkedInAt set; qr_token status Consumed; CheckInAttempt logged with outcome Success per NFR-02

cases.title: Successful check-in transitions Attendance Pending to Present and QrToken Valid to Consumed
preconditions: Pending attendance_records row in PostgreSQL for enrolled studentId and Active sessionId
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid linked to sessionId
CheckInService.submit callable with TestClock fixed within token TTL and attendance window
steps: Record beforeState Attendance Pending and QrToken Valid from database
Invoke CheckInService.submit with valid tokenId and in-radius locationPayload
Query attendance_records and assert afterState Present with non-null checkedInAt
Query qr_tokens and assert afterState Consumed
Verify SM-02 and SM-03 state machine guards per 07-state-machines.md
cases.expected: beforeState Pending/Valid; afterState Present/Consumed per SM-02 §4.1 and SM-03 §4.4; aligns with AC-07a success path

cases.title: POST /check-in returns 200 with Success outcome and attendance DTO for valid submission
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session cookie is set
Active sessionId with Valid QrToken and student Pending attendance
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight already returned 200 outcome Valid
steps: Send POST /api/v1/check-in with body { tokenId, latitude: 10.762700, longitude: 106.660200, spoofMetadata: { mockLocationDetected: false, platform: "android" } }
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert Content-Type application/json; charset=utf-8
Assert response body contains outcome Success, message Điểm danh thành công
Assert response body attendance object contains status Present and checkedInAt ISO 8601 UTC string
Assert no errorCode field present on success envelope per API design §6.3
cases.expected: HTTP 200 Success contract per API design §6.2 and §6.3; full check-in success envelope for mobile web client

cases.title: POST /check-in for not-enrolled student returns 403 NotEnrolled envelope
preconditions: Authenticated Student session for user not enrolled in target session
Valid unexpired QrToken for Active session
In-radius coordinates supplied in request body
steps: POST /check-in with valid tokenId and coordinates using non-enrolled Student session
Assert HTTP status 403
Assert response body outcome NotEnrolled and errorCode NotEnrolled
Assert response body message contains Bạn không thuộc danh sách lớp của buổi học này
Verify CheckInAttempt row inserted with outcome NotEnrolled per FR-09
cases.expected: HTTP 403 NotEnrolled per API design §6.3; canonical failure envelope; no Present attendance per AC-07b

cases.title: Instructor denied POST /check-in with 403 Forbidden (lacks checkin:submit)
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor session is available
Active session with valid QrToken exists
Instructor role lacks checkin:submit permission per roles-permissions §2.2
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Instructor session and assert HTTP 403 Forbidden
POST /check-in with valid tokenId and in-radius coordinates using Instructor session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode Forbidden with localized permission-denied message
Verify no attendance record for instructor userId transitions to Present
cases.expected: Only Student role holds checkin:submit; Instructor preflight and check-in attempt denied with HTTP 403 per §2.3 Check-in permissions

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin denied POST /check-in with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session is available
Active session with valid QrToken and enrolled student context exists
Admin role lacks checkin:submit per roles-permissions §2.2 matrix
steps: POST /check-in with valid tokenId and coordinates using TrainingOfficeAdmin session
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Assert no Present attendance created for admin userId
cases.expected: checkin:submit restricted to Student role; admin cannot submit check-in on behalf of students via this endpoint

cases.title: Not-enrolled student check-in boundary: 403 NotEnrolled and attendance remains non-Present
preconditions: Two students: Student A enrolled in session, Student B authenticated but not enrolled
Same Active session and shared valid QrToken fixture
Both students have in-radius GPS coordinates
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight as Student A and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid
POST /check-in as Student A with tokenId and assert HTTP 200 outcome Success (control: enrolled path works)
Issue fresh Valid token for second assertion
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:newTokenId/preflight as Student B and assert HTTP 403 NotEnrolled
POST /check-in as Student B with new tokenId and in-radius coordinates
Assert HTTP 403 with outcome NotEnrolled
Query attendance for Student B and sessionId and assert status is not Present
cases.expected: Enrollment boundary enforced at preflight and submit per validation-rules §3.6a; enrolled succeeds, non-enrolled rejected without Present per AC-07b and AC-07e

cases.title: Flow A step 4: Enrolled student POST /check-in after QR poll and preflight pass
preconditions: Flow A steps 1–3 complete: roster seeded, session opened Active, QR token polled via GET /sessions/:id/qr/current
Authenticated enrolled Student session established (login with returnUrl preserving deep link)
Student coordinates within session radius
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session and assert HTTP 200 outcome Valid with session summary
POST /check-in with tokenId from Flow A step 3, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200 using Student session
Assert HTTP 200 outcome Success with attendance Present
Instructor GET /sessions/:sessionId/attendance and assert present count incremented by 1
Verify tokenId status Consumed in database
cases.expected: Flow A happy-path check-in step succeeds per testing-plan §6 Flow A; AC-07a validated end-to-end in workshop lifecycle after preflight gate

cases.title: CheckInService persists CheckInAttempt row with Success outcome on every successful submission
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrollment, Valid QrToken, Pending attendance
check_in_attempts table accessible for inspection
steps: Count check_in_attempts rows for sessionId and studentId before submit
Invoke CheckInService.submit with valid payload
Query newest check_in_attempts row for sessionId and studentId
Assert outcome Success, studentId matches, tokenId matches, submittedAt populated
Assert raw latitude/longitude not persisted in attendance_records per NFR-12
cases.expected: Every check-in attempt logged per FR-09 and checkin-qr module §2.4; Success outcome recorded alongside Present attendance

cases.title: Successful check-in API response time meets NFR-04 p95 ≤ 2 s under pilot load baseline
preconditions: API and PostgreSQL running in local/CI environment matching pilot config
150 enrolled students with Pending attendance for Active session (load fixture)
Valid QrTokens available; staggered check-in window 0–5 min per testing-plan §7
steps: Execute 150 sequential or staggered POST /check-in requests with unique enrolled students and valid tokens
Record response latency for each request
Compute p95 latency across successful 200 responses
Assert p95 ≤ 2000 ms and error rate < 0.1%
cases.expected: Peak concurrent check-in meets NFR-04 p95 ≤ 2 s target tied to AC-07a confirmation SLA; supports pilot readiness gate

cases.title: Mobile web QR scan check-in journey: scan deep link → preflight → GPS capture → success confirmation
preconditions: Authenticated Student logged in on mobile viewport 375×812 (iOS Safari user-agent or Android Chrome)
Active session with instructor QR displayed; valid qrPayload wecheck://check-in?token=uuid&session=uuid
Browser geolocation mocked or granted with in-radius coordinates (10.762700, 106.660200)
steps: Student scans QR or navigates to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Verify validating_token inline spinner on scan step while GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight is in flight
Verify GpsCaptureStep mounts only after preflight returns 200 outcome Valid
Verify session summary (class code, subject code, room name) visible in GPS step header per AC-07c
Grant location permission and wait for coordinates capture
Tap Xác nhận điểm danh or equivalent submit control
Verify success panel displays Điểm danh thành công with Present status and checked-in timestamp
Verify page renders correctly on mobile viewport without horizontal scroll per NFR-18
cases.expected: AC-07a and AC-07c mobile web check-in UX complete on iOS Safari or Android Chrome; preflight gate before GPS; no native app required per FR-07 and MVP scope §7.3

cases.title: Mobile check-in confirmation UI appears within 2 seconds of submit tap
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport with GPS permission granted
Active session and valid unexpired token deep-linked to /check-in page
Preflight already passed and GpsCaptureStep in ready state
Network throttling disabled (normal network profile)
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId on mobile viewport
Wait for preflight pass and GPS ready state (Vị trí đã sẵn sàng)
Record timestamp T0 immediately before clicking submit button
Click submit after GPS coordinates captured
Wait for success confirmation element (Điểm danh thành công or Present badge)
Record timestamp T1 when success UI visible
Assert T1 minus T0 ≤ 2000 ms
cases.expected: User-visible confirmation within 2 s under normal network per AC-07a and NFR-04; server-authoritative outcome reflected in UI

cases.title: Mobile check-in page shows NotEnrolled at preflight without mounting GPS step
preconditions: Authenticated Student B (studentb) not enrolled in target session on mobile viewport 375px width
Valid check-in deep link with tokenId and sessionId for Active session
steps: Student B opens /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId
Verify GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 403 with errorCode NotEnrolled
Verify GpsCaptureStep does not mount (no data-testid gps-capture-step or GPS permission prompt)
Verify error panel displays Bạn không thuộc danh sách lớp của buổi học này (NotEnrolled outcome)
Verify no success confirmation or Present badge shown
Verify student can navigate back or close outcome panel
cases.expected: AC-07b and AC-07e surfaced in mobile web UI at preflight; non-enrolled student sees rejection without GPS capture per user-flows §WF-03 and BR-15

cases.title: Check-in deep link from QR opens login redirect then returns to check-in after auth
preconditions: Unauthenticated student opens scanned QR deep link on mobile browser
Active session with valid token in QR payload
Student account exists with valid credentials
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId without session cookie
Verify redirect to /login with returnUrl preserving check-in query params
Complete login with valid student credentials
Verify redirect back to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId with session established
Verify preflight runs and passes before GpsCaptureStep mounts
Complete GPS capture and submit; verify success confirmation
cases.expected: Mobile QR scan flow integrates auth gate per AC-02b and FR-07; student completes check-in after login without re-scanning QR; preflight gate enforced per BR-15

cases.title: GET /check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight returns 200 with session summary for enrolled student on Active session
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session for class HESD-01 / subject SWE-101
Enrolled studentId with Pending attendance for session
Valid qr_tokens row with status Valid linked to sessionId
CheckInPreflightService or equivalent read-only handler wired to repositories
steps: Invoke GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight with authenticated enrolled Student session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response outcome Valid, tokenId and sessionId match fixture
Assert response session object contains classCode HESD-01, subjectCode SWE-101, roomName, status Active
Query attendance_records and qr_tokens and assert no writes occurred (read-only preflight)
cases.expected: AC-07c satisfied: preflight returns 200 with session context for GPS step header; no database mutations per API design §6.2 and BR-15

cases.title: Preflight rejects ExpiredQr, NotEnrolled, SessionMismatch, and TokenNotFound before GPS step
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL with Active session, enrolled Student A, non-enrolled Student B
Fixtures: expired qr_token (>30 s), unknown tokenId UUID, valid token with mismatched sessionId query param
CheckInPreflightService evaluates validation-rules §3.6a chain
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:expiredTokenId/preflight as Student A; assert HTTP 403 errorCode ExpiredQr
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:validTokenId/preflight as Student B; assert HTTP 403 errorCode NotEnrolled
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:validTokenId/preflight?sessionId=:wrongSessionId as Student A; assert HTTP 403 errorCode SessionMismatch
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:unknownUuid/preflight as Student A; assert HTTP 404 errorCode TokenNotFound
Verify no attendance_records or qr_tokens rows modified by any preflight call
cases.expected: AC-07d, AC-07e, AC-07f satisfied: all preflight failure outcomes reject before GPS capture; read-only chain per validation-rules §3.6a

cases.title: TS-21a: QR preflight valid token for enrolled student returns 200 with session summary
preconditions: Active session with class HESD-01, subject SWE-101, room Phòng A201
Authenticated enrolled Student session
Valid unexpired QrToken from GET /sessions/:sessionId/qr/current
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight using Student session
Assert HTTP status 200 and Content-Type application/json
Assert response outcome Valid with session.classCode, session.subjectCode, session.roomName populated
Assert response session.status is Active
Verify no check-in attempt row created by preflight alone
cases.expected: TS-21a and AC-07c: preflight 200 enables client transition to gps_capture with session summary visible

cases.title: TS-21b: QR preflight expired or unknown token rejects without advancing to GPS
preconditions: Active session exists
Authenticated enrolled Student session
Expired QrToken (issued >30 s ago) and random unknown tokenId UUID available
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:expiredTokenId/preflight using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 with errorCode ExpiredQr and message Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới
GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:unknownTokenId/preflight using Student session
Assert HTTP status 404 with errorCode TokenNotFound
Verify no Present attendance created for either call
cases.expected: TS-21b and AC-07d: expired or unknown token preflight fails; client must remain on scan step without GPS mount per BR-15

cases.title: TS-21c: QR preflight session mismatch rejects with SessionMismatch
preconditions: Active session A with valid QrToken bound to session A
Second session B exists with different sessionId
Authenticated enrolled Student enrolled in session A class-subject
steps: GET /api/v1/check-in/tokens/:tokenId/preflight?sessionId=:sessionBId using Student session
Assert HTTP status 403 with errorCode SessionMismatch
Assert response message indicates QR session does not match token bound session
Verify no attendance status change and token remains Valid
cases.expected: TS-21c and AC-07f: deep-link session id mismatch rejected at preflight; GpsCaptureStep must not mount

cases.title: CheckInFlow does not mount GpsCaptureStep until preflight returns outcome Valid
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport 375px
Active session with valid tokenId for happy-path assertion
Stale expired tokenId fixture for rejection assertion
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:expiredTokenId&session=:sessionId
Assert data-testid gps-capture-step is absent while validating_token spinner visible
Wait for preflight failure; assert student remains on scan step with ExpiredQr outcome
Navigate to /check-in?token=:validTokenId&session=:sessionId
Assert validating_token state then gps-capture-step mounts after preflight 200
Assert session summary strip shows class, subject, and room per AC-07c
cases.expected: BR-15 enforced in UI: GpsCaptureStep mounts only after preflight pass; failures keep user on scan step per AC-07c and AC-07d

cases.title: GpsCaptureStep ready state shows check icon without Spinner; aria-busy false; submit enabled
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student on mobile viewport
Valid token deep link; preflight passes
VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=true with gpsSim=delay query param for harness
GpsCaptureStep reaches gpsState ready with captured coordinates
steps: Navigate to /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId&gpsSim=delay
Wait for GpsCaptureStep to reach ready substate
Assert copy Vị trí đã sẵn sàng is visible
Assert no Spinner element in GPS step region
Assert submit region aria-busy is false
Assert Xác nhận điểm danh button is enabled and clickable
cases.expected: GPS ready-state UX per ui-states §4.2 and ui-ux §2.2: static check icon, no spinner, submit enabled immediately when coordinates acquired after preflight pass

cases.title: gpsSim query params ignored when VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false
preconditions: Web build compiled with VITE_ENABLE_DEVICE_SIMULATION=false (production default)
Authenticated enrolled Student session
Active session with valid QrToken; preflight returns 200
Check-in deep link includes gpsSim=delay and gpsLat/gpsLng in-room coordinates
steps: Load /check-in?token=:tokenId&session=:sessionId&gpsSim=delay&gpsLat=10.762700&gpsLng=106.660200 in browser with simulation flag off
Verify client does not auto-resolve simulated coordinates from query params
Verify browser geolocation API is invoked (or permission prompt shown) instead of simulation layer
Without granting real GPS, assert check-in cannot proceed to success solely from gpsSim params
Optionally grant mocked geolocation in test harness and complete successful POST /check-in
cases.expected: AC-08e and NFR-24: production builds ignore gpsSim/cameraSim URL params; client uses real navigator.geolocation per demo-guides §7 and testing-plan §8
